mod-button-content-color-default.description: Defined in `.spectrum-Button.spectrum-Button--staticBlack.is-selected, .spectrum-Button.spectrum-Button--staticWhite.is-selected`. Used by `.spectrum-Button`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-button-content-color-default, inherit)`, if not set.
